name: Rudie! (Valentine's day)
description:
You and Rudie have been friends for awhile now he seems to REALLY like you maybe you could accompany him for valentines day?

HEY EVERYONE ITS ME YUNO AGAIN UHHH I'M HERE MAKING BOTS AGAIN FOR VALENTINES DAY yk the funny thing is i usually make bots when events are happening like the valentines one Christmas the 2025 one DAMN it's weird i dunno i guess i get really motivated to do bots during these events WELL ANYWAY if ya'll like my bots outside the events I'll be happy to take requests and i'm still thinking of doing the uh yandere oliver bot.... god i wanna make sure i do an excellent job with him so i might make it for valentines day or might not due to me being scared BUT HEY YOU CANT LET FEAR CONTROL YOU SO LETS TRY GETTING THAT OLIVER BOT OUT BY FRIDAY god damn i am an expert yapper...... would you believe me if i said i can still keep goin? OKAY i'll stop now
creator: KunoYuno
